sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. Makes New $11.47 Million Investment in Copart, Inc. $CPRT
feed.summary: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. has made a significant new investment in Copart, Inc., purchasing 255,000 shares valued at approximately $11.47 million during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with other hedge funds also adjusting their stakes in Copart. The article also details recent insider transactions and analyst ratings, with Copart holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $47.60.

feed.title: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC Takes $1.26 Million Position in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET
feed.summary: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC has established a new $1.26 million stake in Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) during the third quarter, acquiring 8,610 shares. This move comes as Arista Networks continues to show strong financial performance, beating third-quarter estimates with $0.75 EPS and $2.31 billion in revenue, reflecting a 27.5% year-over-year increase. Despite significant insider selling over the past quarter, institutional investors maintain a substantial ownership of 82.47%.

feed.title: Red Cedar Investment Management LLC Invests $2.09 Million in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS
feed.summary: Red Cedar Investment Management LLC has invested $2.09 million in The Goldman Sachs Group by purchasing 2,622 shares during the third quarter. This comes amidst other institutional investors adjusting their stakes and a director selling 19,796 shares. The Goldman Sachs Group recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Meta signs deal to pay Corning up to $6 billion for fiber-optic cables, CNBC reports
feed.summary: Meta Platforms has reportedly signed a deal with Corning for up to $6 billion worth of fiber-optic cables for its AI data centers, as reported by CNBC. This move underscores Meta's aggressive investment in data center infrastructure to advance its competitive AI technologies. Following the news, Corning's shares saw a significant jump in premarket trading, while Meta's stock gained marginally.

feed.title: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC Has $270,000 Stock Holdings in Booking Holdings Inc. $BKNG
feed.summary: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC significantly decreased its stake in Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) by 97% in the third quarter, reducing its holdings to 50 shares valued at $270,000. Insider selling has also been substantial, with CEO Glenn D. Fogel selling shares worth approximately $4.94 million and other insiders selling over $17 million in the past 90 days. Despite this, analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $6,209.94.

feed.title: Markel Group Inc. Sells 68,000 Shares of Archer Daniels Midland Company $ADM
feed.summary: Markel Group Inc. reduced its stake in Archer Daniels Midland Company by 4.3% in the third quarter, holding 1,505,800 shares valued at approximately $89.96 million. This divestment comes amidst mixed analyst ratings for ADM, with a consensus "Reduce" rating and a $54.50 price target, despite the company slightly beating EPS estimates but missing revenue expectations in its latest quarter. Archer Daniels Midland also announced a quarterly dividend, resulting in a 3.0% yield, and trades with a market cap of around $32.4 billion.

feed.title: NextEra Energy fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results available on company's website
feed.summary: NextEra Energy has announced the availability of its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on the company's website. The full release is accessible via a direct link. For media inquiries, a contact number has been provided.

feed.title: Markel Group Inc. Purchases 6,250 Shares of Linde PLC $LIN
feed.summary: Markel Group Inc. increased its stake in Linde PLC by 3.3%, acquiring an additional 6,250 shares to hold a total of 192,850 shares valued at $91.6 million. Other institutional investors have also recently adjusted their positions in Linde, which currently has a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $501.75. The basic materials company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has provided positive guidance for FY 2025 and Q4 2025.

feed.title: Scalar Gauge Management LLC Invests $2.55 Million in Howmet Aerospace Inc. $HWM
feed.summary: Scalar Gauge Management LLC recently acquired 13,000 shares of Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) worth approximately $2.55 million, making it their 23rd largest holding. Howmet Aerospace has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $224.53, following strong Q3 earnings and positive guidance. Institutional investors now own 90.46% of the company's stock, underscoring significant institutional confidence.

feed.title: Markel Group Inc. Purchases 6,250 Shares of HCA Healthcare, Inc. $HCA
feed.summary: Markel Group Inc. increased its stake in HCA Healthcare by 9.1%, purchasing an additional 6,250 shares, bringing their total holdings to 75,213 shares valued at approximately $32.06 million. This comes as HCA Healthcare reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with an EPS of $6.96 and revenue of $19.16 billion, a 9.6% year-over-year increase. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with various institutional investors also adjusting their positions in the stock.

feed.title: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC Makes New $1.14 Million Investment in eBay Inc. $EBAY
feed.summary: Pier 88 Investment Partners LLC has made a new investment of $1.14 million in eBay Inc., acquiring 12,500 shares during the third quarter. The e-commerce giant beat Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2025 guidance. While institutional investors own a significant portion of the stock, recent insider activity shows net selling.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Has $8.93 Million Position in Autodesk, Inc. $ADSK
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS recently reduced its stake in Autodesk, Inc. by 13.3%, now holding 28,123 shares valued at approximately $8.93 million. This comes as Autodesk reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $2.67 EPS and $1.85 billion in revenue, and forecasting solid FY2026 guidance. Institutional investors hold 90.24% of the company, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $369.97.

feed.title: NextEra beats quarterly profit estimates on utility demand
feed.summary: NextEra Energy exceeded Wall Street's adjusted profit estimates for the fourth quarter, driven by increased power demand, strong performance in its renewables division, and rate hikes at its electric utility. The company reported adjusted earnings of 54 cents per share, surpassing the average analyst estimate of 53 cents per share. This performance comes as U.S. power consumption is predicted to reach record highs in 2026, partly due to demand from AI data centers and cryptocurrency mining.

feed.title: Down 5% In Last 12 Months, Can CSX Stock Give Better Returns In 2026?
feed.summary: CSX Corporation experienced a challenging 2025 but is implementing a turnaround strategy under new CEO Steve Angel, targeting operating margin improvement. The TIKR model projects CSX stock could reach $43 by December 2028, representing an 18% total return, based on 3.7% annual revenue growth and 37% operating margins. The article emphasizes the potential for margin expansion through cost management and strategic infrastructure investments like the Howard Street Tunnel.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Increases Position in APA Corporation $APA
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS has increased its stake in APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) by 7.5% in the third quarter, now owning 1,873,041 shares valued at $45,477,000. Other institutional investors like AQR Capital Management LLC and Evergreen Capital Management LLC also significantly increased their positions. APA Corporation saw its stock open at $25.40, has a market cap of $9.01 billion, and recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share.

feed.title: UAW members at GM to receive $10,500 profit sharing checks
feed.summary: General Motors announced that approximately 47,000 UAW-represented workers are expected to receive $10,500 in profit-sharing for 2025. This figure is the lowest for eligible UAW employees in recent years. The announcement was made on January 27, 2026, as GM reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Reduces Stock Position in Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC decreased its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) by 16.9% in Q3, selling 39,579 shares but still holding 195,127 shares valued at $8.81 million. The biopharmaceutical company exceeded Q3 earnings estimates with an EPS of $1.63 and revenue of $12.22 billion, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.63. Institutional investors collectively own about 76% of Bristol Myers Squibb, which has a market cap of approximately $111.3 billion.

feed.title: Boeing Cash, Sales Rise After Most Jet Deliveries Since 2018
feed.summary: Boeing (BA) reported a strong financial quarter, generating cash for the second consecutive time and experiencing a 57% increase in sales. This performance was driven by the highest number of jet deliveries since 2018 and includes a significant gain from the sale of its Jeppesen subsidiary. The results indicate a continued recovery for the US planemaker amid surging orders.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Decreases Stake in American Tower Corporation $AMT
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC reduced its stake in American Tower Corporation (AMT) by 13.6% in Q3, selling 8,714 shares and holding 55,210 shares valued at $10.63 million. While Director Eugene F. Reilly increased his holdings, major shareholder Tower Corp significantly decreased its position. Wall Street analysts recommend a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $218.79, and the company offers a 3.8% dividend yield.

feed.title: Medtronic PLC $MDT Shares Acquired by Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC has increased its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 8.9% in Q3, now owning 130,750 shares valued at approximately $12.45 million. This comes after Medtronic reported better-than-expected Q3 earnings with $1.36 EPS and $8.96 billion in revenue, also issuing strong guidance for FY2026. The medical technology company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $110.28.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Sells 13,568 Shares of Fortinet, Inc. $FTNT
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC has reduced its stake in Fortinet, Inc. by 11.3%, selling 13,568 shares. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Vanguard Group Inc. have increased their positions. The article also highlights recent insider sales by CEO Ken Xie and VP Michael Xie, Fortinet's positive Q3 earnings report exceeding estimates, and current analyst ratings for the company.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Has $9.58 Million Position in Elevance Health, Inc. $ELV
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC reduced its stake in Elevance Health by 18.3% in Q3, selling 6,617 shares to hold a 29,630-share position valued at $9.58 million. Despite mixed analyst sentiment, with an average price target of $399.63 and some recent downgrades balanced by upgrades, institutional ownership remains high at 89.24%. Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) features a market capitalization of $83.9 billion, a P/E ratio of 15.43, and trades around $377.52, within a 12-month range of $273.71–$458.75.

feed.title: Is AMD’s (AMD) New Board Pick and TCS AI Pact Reframing Its Enterprise Strategy?
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Sasha Jovanovic
feed.summary: AMD has recently expanded its board to include KC McClure, former Accenture CFO, and partnered with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) to co-develop AI solutions. These strategic moves are seen as AMD's effort to enhance financial oversight and strengthen its position in the enterprise AI market. The article suggests that while the TCS collaboration reinforces AMD's AI partnerships, the long-term impact on its earnings outlook is yet to be fully realized, with investor sentiment highlighting varied perspectives on AMD's valuation and growth potential.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Up in Premarket Trading; Humana, UnitedHealth Group Lag
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures are showing gains in premarket trading. However, Humana and UnitedHealth Group are lagging behind. Cloudflare Inc. Class A and EquipmentShare.com Inc. Class A stocks are notably up in pre-market trading.

feed.title: Blackstone Makes Over $400 Million Gain on Marathon Sale to CVC
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. realized a gain of over $400 million from the sale of Marathon Asset Management to CVC Capital Partners Plc. Blackstone's GP stakes platform, which held a minority stake in Marathon, saw more than triple its initial investment due to the $1.2 billion acquisition. This deal represents a significant return for Blackstone.

feed.title: Vulcan Value Partners’ Investment Journey with Everest Group Ltd. (EG)
feed.summary: Vulcan Value Partners discussed their re-investment in Everest Group, Ltd. (NYSE: EG) in their Q4 2025 investor letter. The firm initially owned Everest RE (now Everest Group) for 11 years, sold it in 2020, repurchased it in their Large Cap strategy in Q3 2023, and later added it to their Small Cap strategy due to declining stock price despite steady value per share growth. Vulcan Value Partners highlights Everest Group's strong position as a top reinsurer, its underwriting profits, and undervaluation, noting its share repurchase program as a positive indicator.

feed.title: Here’s Why CoStar Group (CSGP) Traded Lower in 2025
feed.summary: Vulcan Value Partners highlighted CoStar Group, Inc. (CSGP) as a significant detractor in its Q4 2025 Focus Plus Strategy, primarily due to the substantial and persistent investment in Homes.com, which has underperformed expectations and remains loss-making. Despite strong core commercial business growth, the firm views residential efforts as optionality and is re-evaluating its impact. While CSGP saw a 20% year-over-year revenue increase in Q3 2025, its shares traded lower, reflecting investor concerns about its residential ventures.

feed.title: |Arrow Electronics, Inc. (ARW) Partners With .Lumen
feed.summary: |Arrow Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: ARW) has partnered with .lumen, a Romanian startup, to scale the production of smart glasses for the blind. These glasses, showcased at CES 2026, utilize AI, cameras, and haptic feedback to help visually impaired users navigate independently. Arrow Electronics will provide support in component sourcing, engineering optimization, inventory management, and cost control for the project.

feed.title: Deere’s Strategic Pivot: Navigating Cyclical Headwinds with Technology
feed.summary: Deere & Company is actively addressing a projected "trough year" in 2026 for its major equipment cycle by aggressively expanding its technological portfolio to create stable, high-margin revenue streams. Despite anticipated declines in its North American large agriculture equipment segment and increased labor costs, the company aims to offset these with growth in other divisions, price adjustments, and recurring income from precision technology subscriptions. This strategy is critical for balancing short-term cyclical pressures with long-term technological innovation for sustained profitability.

feed.title: Applied Materials announces new 8.06 lakh square-foot workplace in Bengaluru
feed.summary: Applied Materials has inaugurated a new 8.06 lakh square-foot workplace in Bengaluru, underscoring its commitment to India's semiconductor mission and setting standards for sustainable and inclusive workplace design. This investment reinforces Karnataka's position as a leading ESDM and chip design hub. The facility will strengthen Applied Materials' capabilities in R&D, product engineering, and co-innovation within India's rapidly advancing semiconductor ecosystem.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Releases Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025, with the earnings release available in its Form 8-K filing and investor relations website. The company will also webcast its earnings conference call today at 9:30 a.m. Eastern time. Northrop Grumman is recognized as a leading global aerospace and defense technology company.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Corp (NASDAQ:KMB) Posts Mixed Q4 2025 Results with Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with revenues slightly below expectations at $4.08 billion but non-GAAP EPS exceeding forecasts at $1.86. The company's "Powering Care" strategy appears to be improving profitability and cost discipline, leading to a cautiously optimistic market reaction with KMB shares up 1.34% in pre-market trading. Management also announced an increase in the quarterly dividend to $1.28 per share, signaling confidence in ongoing strategic transformation and financial stability.

feed.title: Dutch court rules Uber drivers can be treated as self-employed
feed.summary: A Dutch court has overturned a 2021 ruling, deciding that Uber drivers can be treated as independent entrepreneurs rather than employees. The court cited drivers' investments in their vehicles, freedom to choose working hours, and ability to accept or reject rides as reasons. This ruling is a victory for Uber in the Netherlands, though the company continues to face similar legal challenges in other countries regarding driver classification.

feed.title: RTX Stock Jumps After Earnings. It Has ‘Great Momentum,’ Says CEO.
feed.summary: Shares of RTX, a major defense and aerospace company, saw a jump in stock price on Tuesday following the release of its quarterly earnings report. The company announced better-than-expected results, prompting its CEO to express confidence, stating that the company has "great momentum."

feed.title: CoStar Group stock rating upgraded to Buy at BTIG on sales growth
feed.summary: BTIG upgraded CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) stock from Neutral to Buy, setting an $80 price target due to anticipated accelerated bookings and double-digit organic growth from a refocused salesforce. The firm noted low expectations for CoStar's residential real estate efforts, with Homes.com gaining momentum and an upcoming AI-driven product update. Despite recent underperformance with a 29.2% price decline over the past six months, BTIG believes the stock's valuation attributes little value to the residential business, presenting a buying opportunity.

feed.title: Jefferies raises Deckers Outdoor stock price target to $105 on HOKA strength
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Deckers Outdoor (NYSE:DECK) to $105 from $102, maintaining a Hold rating due to strong direct-to-consumer sales for its HOKA brand. The firm projects HOKA sales growth to exceed consensus, while UGG brand sales are expected to decline. Deckers is set to report earnings soon, with a "GREAT" financial health score, amidst varied analyst outlooks regarding both opportunities and challenges, particularly concerning tariff impacts and HOKA's long-term performance.

feed.title: McDonald's Changeables Happy Meal from 1980s is back
feed.summary: McDonald's is bringing back its popular Changeables Happy Meal toys from the 1980s, which transform from menu items into figures like robots and dinosaurs. These limited-time toys, available starting Tuesday, Jan. 27, are a response to high customer demand and aim to evoke nostalgia for older fans while introducing them to a new generation. The collection features 16 updated robot and dinosaur designs from the original Happy Meal programs.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd (IVZ) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings: Revenue Surges but EPS Misses, Large Net Loss
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd (IVZ) reported Q4 2025 earnings with a significant revenue increase but missed EPS estimates and posted a large net loss. Revenue grew 45.69% to $1.69 billion, beating consensus, but the company recorded a net loss of $1.19 billion and diluted EPS of -2.61, far below the estimated 0.58. Operating cash flow remained positive, and the company's cash balance exceeded $1 billion, though total liabilities also increased.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (HCA) unveils $10B share buyback and $0.78 dividend
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) has announced a new share repurchase program authorizing an additional $10 billion for buying back outstanding common stock. The company's Board of Directors also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.78 per share, payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 17, 2026. These actions signify HCA's commitment to returning capital to its shareholders through both buybacks and dividends.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Invests $6.17 Million in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: LBP AM SA has established a new position in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) by purchasing 14,612 shares valued at approximately $6.17 million in the third quarter, contributing to the company's significant institutional ownership of 83.46%. Despite a slight revenue decline, Cummins recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $5.59 EPS and $8.32 billion in revenue. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus, though recent insider activity shows net selling of 19,330 shares.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Boosts Stock Holdings in Abbott Laboratories $ABT
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa significantly increased its stake in Abbott Laboratories (ABT) by 59.8% in Q3, now holding over 46,000 shares worth approximately $6.19 million. Despite revenue missing expectations, Abbott reported in-line EPS, raised its quarterly dividend, and received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, though some analysts have trimmed price targets. The article also highlights varying sentiment, from insider buying and core growth drivers to cautious guidance and price target reductions.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Sells 30,416 Shares of Republic Services, Inc. $RSG
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa reduced its stake in Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) by 46.3% in the third quarter, selling 30,416 shares and retaining 35,288 shares valued at $8.10 million. Despite this, other institutions increased their holdings, and director Katharine Weymouth purchased additional shares. Republic Services reported a Q3 EPS beat of $1.90, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $248.82.

feed.title: James Investment Research Inc. Sells 8,598 Shares of Prologis, Inc. $PLD
feed.summary: James Investment Research Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Prologis, Inc. by 47.1%, selling 8,598 shares and retaining 9,640 shares valued at $1.104 million. Despite the institutional selling, Prologis saw increases in holdings from other firms and reported in-line EPS, strong revenue, and a $1.01 quarterly dividend, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company's stock trades at $126.50, has a market cap of $117.50 billion, and has provided guidance for FY 2026 EPS between $6.00 and $6.20.

feed.title: James Investment Research Inc. Acquires 2,412 Shares of International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: James Investment Research Inc. increased its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 324.2% in the third quarter, adding 2,412 shares to hold a total of 3,156 shares valued at approximately $890,000. Analysts have given IBM a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $306.86. The technology company has a market capitalization of about $277.2 billion and a P/E ratio of 35.47.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Acquires 3,789 Shares of Deere & Company $DE
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa increased its stake in Deere & Company by 39.6%, acquiring an additional 3,789 shares, bringing their total ownership to 13,354 shares valued at approximately $6.11 million. This increase in institutional ownership comes despite significant insider selling, with the CEO and other insiders selling over $32 million worth of shares recently. Deere & Company reported mixed quarterly earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $524.20.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Buys 9,436 Shares of Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 246.0% during the third quarter, adding 9,436 shares to hold a total of 13,271 shares valued at approximately $6.33 million. Caterpillar's recent earnings beat analyst expectations, reporting $4.95 EPS and $17.64 billion in revenue, leading to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, despite significant insider selling. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share.

feed.title: BTO.TO B2Gold (TSX) C$7.34 pre-market, 11.87M shares 27 Jan 2026: monitor 2026 outlook
feed.summary: B2Gold (BTO.TO) is experiencing significant pre-market activity on the TSX, with 11.87 million shares trading at C$7.34, well above its average volume. The company shows solid fundamentals with a C$9.81 billion market cap, low leverage, and operations in key gold-producing regions. Meyka AI projects a 19.07% upside to C$8.74 within 12 months and an 86.23% rise to C$13.67 in three years, supported by strong sector performance and upcoming earnings on February 18, 2026.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (RTX) RTX Corporation Posts Q4 Sales $24.24B, vs. FactSet Est of $22.70B
feed.summary: RTX Corporation reported Q4 sales of $24.24 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $22.70 billion. This financial update, issued by MT Newswires, highlights the company's stronger-than-expected revenue performance for the quarter. The article does not provide further details on the reasons for the beat, or forward-looking statements.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare's Q4 revenue slightly misses estimates, announces buyback
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare's fourth-quarter revenue fell slightly short of analyst estimates. Despite the revenue miss, the company announced a new share buyback program. The article is a brief news update from Reuters.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare forecasts 2026 profit above estimates on medical care demand
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare projected its 2026 profit to be higher than Wall Street's expectations, driven by strong demand for medical care services. The hospital operator's forecast follows better-than-expected quarterly earnings, boosted by increased utilization of Medicare insurance plans, particularly among older adults needing surgical procedures. While total revenue for the fourth quarter missed estimates, the company's adjusted profit per share surpassed analysts' predictions.
